title: [#81] Add "Add New Person" button and creation form to the Person List page

risks: TanStack Router mock in new.test.tsx uses vi.mock to override useNavigate — this pattern is consistent with $id.test.tsx but relies on module-level mock hoisting which Vitest handles correctly with dynamic imports.
The LIST_EMPLOYEES_QUERY_KEY constant is a tuple (as const) — callsites that destructure or spread it must match the exact type.

conversation_log.summary: Implemented the co-located unit test file for new.tsx (apps/frontend/src/routes/employee/new.test.tsx). The route files (new.tsx, employee.tsx) and i18n keys (common.json) were already implemented. The test file covers all AC10 sub-criteria: (a) empty name shows validation error, (b) invalid email shows validation error, (c) valid inputs call createEmployee mutation. Also covers AC4 (cache invalidation), AC5 (navigation), AC6 (error alert + input retention), AC7/AC8 (validation without backend call), AC9 (i18n key presence), and static source checks. PR opened.
